Package neqsim.process.equipment.lng

package neqsim.process.equipment.lng
LNG cargo ageing and transport simulation package.

Provides a layered, transient model for simulating LNG composition and quality drift during storage and marine transport. Key capabilities include:

  • Multi-layer tank model with stratification detection
  • Vapor space thermodynamics with EOS-backed phase equilibrium
  • Voyage profile coupling (ambient temperature, sea state, weather)
  • Rollover risk detection and prevention
  • BOG handling network (compressors, reliquefaction, GCU)
  • Heel management for cooldown and mixing
  • Quality KPI tracking (WI, GCV, MN, density per ISO 6976/6578)

The main entry point is LNGAgeingScenario which orchestrates the time-stepping simulation across all submodels.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

    neqsim.process.equipment
     
  • Class
    Description
    LNGAgeingResult
    Snapshot of LNG ageing KPIs at a single time step.
    LNGAgeingScenario
    Top-level orchestrator for LNG ageing simulations.
    LNGAgeingScenario.OperationalEvent
    Represents an operational event during an LNG voyage or storage period.
    LNGAgeingScenario.OperationalEvent.EventType
    Event type enumeration.
    LNGBOGHandlingNetwork
    Models the BOG handling network on an LNG carrier or terminal.
    LNGBOGHandlingNetwork.BOGDisposition
    BOG disposition breakdown across handling modes.
    LNGBOGHandlingNetwork.HandlingMode
    BOG handling mode.
    LNGHeelManager
    Manages LNG heel retention, cooldown, and mixing operations.
    LNGRolloverDetector
    Detects rollover risk in stratified LNG tanks.
    LNGRolloverDetector.RolloverAssessment
    Result of a rollover assessment.
    LNGRolloverDetector.RolloverRiskLevel
    Risk level enumeration for rollover assessment.
    LNGShipModel
    Multi-tank LNG ship model that orchestrates parallel ageing of all cargo tanks.
    LNGShipModel.ShipResult
    Aggregate ship-level result for a single time step.
    LNGSloshingModel
    Models sloshing-induced mixing enhancement in LNG cargo tanks.
    LNGTankLayer
    Represents a single horizontal layer in a stratified LNG tank.
    LNGTankLayeredModel
    Multi-layer LNG tank model with stratification support.
    LNGVaporSpaceModel
    Models the vapor space above the LNG liquid in a cargo tank.
    LNGVoyageProfile
    Defines the environmental and operational profile for an LNG voyage.
    LNGVoyageProfile.EnvironmentConditions
    Environmental conditions at a specific point in the voyage.
    LNGVoyageProfile.Segment
    A single segment of the voyage with constant environmental conditions.
    MethaneNumberCalculator
    Methane Number calculator based on EN 16726 and MWM methods.
    MethaneNumberCalculator.Method
    Calculation method enumeration.
    TankGeometry
    Defines the physical geometry of an LNG cargo tank.
    TankGeometry.ContainmentType
    Tank containment type enumeration.
    TankHeatTransferModel
    Multi-zone heat transfer model for LNG cargo tanks.
    TankHeatTransferModel.HeatTransferZone
    A single heat transfer zone with its own U-value, area, and boundary condition.
